---
title: "MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 03" 
description: "Lecture: Ground & Rock Mechanics"
date: 2020-10-28T08:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: [mad345_lecturenotes,mad345_lecturenotes_week02]
comments: false
---

Dear all,

Lecture notes are available [here.](/upload/mad345t_w03_oct21-22-28.pdf) 

Good luck,

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("hammer_and_pick")`
